title: LDShadowLady's More Crafting Tables Rebrushed
description: A mod that adds 20 themed crafting tables.
body:
Transform your crafting experience with 15+ decorative crafting tables that function identically to vanilla. Perfect for themed builds and creative servers.

Dyed Variants: Full rainbow spectrum

Premium Tables: 💎 Diamond •  💰 Gold

Themed Designs:
🎃 Spooky • 🎉 Viva! • 🥛 Milk Carton
🌈 Rainbow • 🧜 Mermaid • 🌸 Sakura
(And more!)

Please see images for the crafting recipes.


<details>
<summary>Visual Workbench</summary>
If using Visual Workbench, add these lines to its config.
    
    "customcraftingtables:viva_crafting_table",
  
    "customcraftingtables:milk_crafting_table",
    
    "customcraftingtables:gold_crafting_table",
    
    "customcraftingtables:diamond_crafting_table",
    
    "customcraftingtables:moon_crafting_table",
    
    "customcraftingtables:spooky_crafting_table",
    
    "customcraftingtables:rainbow_crafting_table",
    
    "customcraftingtables:pink_mermaid_crafting_table",
    
    "customcraftingtables:purple_crafting_table",
    
    "customcraftingtables:bow_crafting_table",
    
    "customcraftingtables:cyan_crafting_table",
    
    "customcraftingtables:pink_crafting_table",
    
    "customcraftingtables:magenta_crafting_table",
    
    "customcraftingtables:lime_crafting_table",
    
    "customcraftingtables:blue_crafting_table",
    
    "customcraftingtables:white_crafting_table",
    
    "customcraftingtables:red_crafting_table",
    
    "customcraftingtables:orange_crafting_table",
    
    "customcraftingtables:yellow_crafting_table",
    
    "customcraftingtables:captain_crafting_table",
    
    "customcraftingtables:floral_crafting_table",

</details>



This is an unofficial fan continuation. Not affiliated with LDShadowLady. ✨
